full_text:
Dong Yun (Xiuzhao) 董允 (休昭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Yun (董允), styledXiuzhao (休昭), was born in Nan. Checked the growing influence of Huang Hao. Praised by the people. Dong Yun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Dong Yun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
